abilities.description: Teleport to a random tile.Upgraded: Teleport to a random tile. Deal damage to units adjacent to the tile you teleport to.

translation.ru_description: Телепортируйтесь на случайную клетку.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепортируйтесь на случайную клетку. Нанесите урон всем вокруг точки появления.
translation.en_description: Teleport to a random tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport to a random tile. Deal damage to units adjacent to the tile you teleport to.

abilities.description: Inflict Slow on a unit.Upgraded: Inflict Slow on units in an area.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Замедление на юнита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Замедление на юнитов в области.
translation.en_description: Inflict Slow on a unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Slow on units in an area.

abilities.description: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage.Upgraded: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage and emit a Sparkle.

translation.ru_description: Нанеси себе травму (навсегда), затем получите +3 Маг Урона  (до конца боя).
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Нанеси себе травму (навсегда), затем получите +3 Маг Урона и испустите Искру.  (до конца боя)
translation.en_description: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage and emit a Sparkle.

abilities.description: Injure yourself, then restore 15 mana. (Castable once per battle.) Upgraded: Injure yourself, then restore all your mana. (Castable once per battle.)

translation.ru_description:
Нанеси себе травму (навсегда), затем восстановите 15 маны.
[s:.7](Раз за битву.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Нанеси себе травму (навсегда), затем восстановите всю ману.
[s:.7](Раз за битву.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Injure yourself, then restore 15 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Injure yourself, then restore all your mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

abilities.description: Lose Damage equal to half of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn. (This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.) Upgraded: Lose Damage equal to 1/3rd of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn. (This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)

translation.ru_description:
Потеряйте Урон, равный половине урона вашей базовой атаки. До конца битвы атакуйте лишний раз за ход.
[s:.7](Нельзя, если урон атаки 1 или меньше.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Потеряйте Урон, равный 1/3 урона вашей базовой атаки. До конца битвы атакуйте лишний раз за ход.
[s:.7](Нельзя, если урон атаки 1 или меньше.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Lose Damage equal to half of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Lose Damage equal to 1/3rd of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes the first unit it hits.Upgraded: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes every unit it hits.

translation.ru_description: Выстрел льдом по линии, замораживающий первого попавшегося.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Выстрел льдом по линии, замораживающий всех на пути.
translation.en_description: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes the first unit it hits.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes every unit it hits.

abilities.description: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 1 space.Upgraded: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 3 spaces, at infinite range.

translation.ru_description: Отбросьте всех вокруг выбранной клетки на 1.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Отбросьте всех вокруг выбранной клетки на 3, бесконечная дальность.
translation.en_description: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 1 space.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 3 spaces, at infinite range.

abilities.description: Give 2 mana to a unit.Upgraded: Give 4 mana to a unit.

translation.ru_description: Дайте 2 маны юниту.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте 4 маны юниту.
translation.en_description: Give 2 mana to a unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give 4 mana to a unit.

abilities.description: Your basic attack gains +1 range and area until the end of the turn.Upgraded: Your basic attack gains +2 range and +1 area until the end of the turn. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Ваша базовая атака получает +1 дальность и область до конца хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Ваша базовая атака получает +2 дальность и +1 область до конца хода.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Your basic attack gains +1 range and area until the end of the turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Your basic attack gains +2 range and +1 area until the end of the turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Your basic attack gains +1 range and area until the end of the turn.Upgraded: Your basic attack gains +2 range and +1 area until the end of the turn. (This spell costs less.)

[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Give all of your mana to a unit in range 3.Upgraded: Give all of your mana plus 2 to a unit.

translation.ru_description: Отдайте всю свою ману юниту в радиусе 3.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Отдайте всю свою ману плюс 2 юниту.
translation.en_description: Give all of your mana to a unit in range 3.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give all of your mana plus 2 to a unit.

abilities.description: The next spell you cast is cast twice.Upgraded: The next spell you or another unit casts is cast twice.

translation.ru_description: Ваше следующее заклинание сработает дважды.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Следующее заклинание (ваше или чужое) сработает дважды.
translation.en_description: The next spell you cast is cast twice.
translation.en_upgraded_description: The next spell you or another unit casts is cast twice.

abilities.description: Inflict Burn 1 and +1 Speed to a unit in range.Upgraded: Inflict Burn 1 and +1 Speed to any unit. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Наложите Горение 1 и +1 [img:spd] на юнита.

abilities.description: Reduce the cost of another unit's spells by 1 until the end of their turn.Upgraded: Reduce the cost of a unit's spells by 1 until the end of their turn. This can target yourself.

abilities.description: Create a whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.Upgraded: Create a larger whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.
